name: index generation: INDEX.md per-file row includes a relative markdown link from _meta/INDEX.md to ../google/x.yaml
command:
mkdir -p tree/google tree/_meta && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-index "$PWD/tree/_meta/INDEX.md" && grep -E '\(\.\./google/x\.yaml\)' tree/_meta/INDEX.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
